metadata.title: Custom Frames
metadata.description: A plugin that turns web apps into panes using iframes with custom styling. Also comes with presets for Google Keep, Todoist and more.

regex.source: text: "Please be advised that, when adding a site as a custom frame, you potentially expose personal information you enter to other plugins you have installed. For more information, see "
regex.target: text: "请注意，当您将网站添加为自定义标签页时，您输入的个人信息可能会暴露给您安装的其他插件。有关更多信息，请参阅 "

regex.source: .setDesc("The padding that should be left around the inside of custom frame panes, in pixels.")
regex.target: .setDesc("自定义标签页内部周围应留的内边距，单位为像素。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The display name that this frame should have.")
regex.target: .setDesc("此标签页应具有的显示名称。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The URL that should be opened in this frame.")

.setDesc("Custom Frames is a lot more restricted on mobile devices and doesn't allow for the same types of content to be displayed. If a frame doesn't work as expected on mobile, it can be disabled.")
regex.target: .setDesc("自定义标签页在移动设备上受到更多限制，不支持显示相同类型的内容。如果某个标签页在移动设备上无法正常工作，可以将其禁用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether a button to open this frame should be added to the ribbon.")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否应在侧边栏添加一个按钮来打开此标签页。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether this frame should be opened in the unpinned center editor rather than one of the panes on the side. This is useful for sites that don't work well in a narrow view, or sites that don't require a note to be open when viewed.")
regex.target: .setDesc("此标签页是否应在未固定的中心编辑器中打开，而不是在侧边栏中打开。这对于在狭窄视图下效果不佳的网站，或在查看时不需要打开笔记的网站很有用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The zoom that this frame's page should be displayed with, as a percentage.")
regex.target: .setDesc("此标签页页面应显示的缩放比例，以百分比表示。")

regex.source: .log(`Skipping frame ${name} which is hidden on mobile`)
regex.target: .log(`跳过在移动设备上隐藏的标签页 ${name}`)

regex.source: .error(`Couldn't register frame ${name}, is there already one with the same name?`)
regex.target: .error(`无法注册标签页 ${name}，是否已存在同名标签页？`)

regex.source: text: "Please note that Obsidian has to be restarted or reloaded for most of these settings to take effect."
regex.target: text: "请注意，大多数设置需要重启或重新加载Obsidian才能生效。"

regex.source: text: "The icon that this frame's pane should have. The names of any "
regex.target: text: "此标签页应具有的图标。可以使用任何 "

regex.source: text: "Whether this frame should use iframes on desktop as opposed to Electron webviews."
regex.target: text: "此标签页在桌面端是使用iframe还是Electron webviews。"

regex.source: text: "Only enable this setting if the frame is causing issues or frequent crashes. This setting causes all Desktop-only settings to be ignored."
regex.target: text: "仅当此标签页导致问题或频繁崩溃时才启用此设置。此设置会导致所有仅限桌面端的设置被忽略。"

regex.source: text: "A snippet of additional CSS that should be applied to this frame."
regex.target: text: "应应用于此标签页的额外CSS代码片段。"

regex.source: text: "Note that this is only applied on Desktop."
regex.target: text: "请注意，这仅适用于桌面端。"

regex.source: text: "A snippet of additional JavaScript that should be applied to this frame."
regex.target: text: "应应用于此标签页的额外JavaScript代码片段。"

regex.source: text: `Create a new frame, either from a preset shipped with the plugin, or a custom one that you can edit yourself. Each frame's pane can be opened using the "Custom Frames: Open" command.`
regex.target: text: `创建一个新标签页，可以从插件自带的预设中选择，也可以自定义编辑。每个标签页的标签页都可以通过“自定义标签页：打开”命令打开。`

regex.source: text: "Need help using the plugin? Feel free to join the Discord server!"
regex.target: text: "需要插件使用帮助？欢迎加入Discord服务器！"

regex.source: text: "If you like this plugin and want to support its development, you can do so through my website by clicking this fancy image!"
regex.target: text: "如果您喜欢此插件并希望支持其开发，可以通过点击此精美图片访问我的网站进行支持！"

regex.source: text: `Couldn't find a frame with name ${frameName}`
regex.target: text: `找不到名为 ${frameName} 的标签页`
text: `${frameName} 在移动设备上隐藏`
